case_title: MACIEL, FRANCISCO VS EBY, ED GEORGE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY MACIEL, FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT EBY, ED GEORGE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-09-2004 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT EBY, ED GEORGE DEFENDANT FAILED TO APPEAR. PLINTIFF IS NOT THE REGISTERED OWNER OF THE SUBJECT VEHICLE AND IS THEREFORE DISQUALIFIED FROM RECOVERING FOR ITS DAMAGES. CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION FEB-09-2004, OFF CALENDAR DEFT FAILED TO APPEAR; NO SERVICE-PLFT TO RE-SET FOR TRIAL AND SERVE DEFT.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUL-19-2004, CONTINUED BY COURT TO AUG-09-2004 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506 SERVICE UNTIMELY.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT SENT TO ED GEORGE EBY RETURNED--PERSON INCARCERATED
TRIAL RESET TO JUL-19-2004 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT EBY, ED GEORGE
NOTICE OF TIME & PLACE OF HEARING SENT TO ED GEORGE EBY RETURNED--DO NOT LIVE HERE
